data.body: Plan-review remediation (BLOCK→resolve): the 'fail closed on unreadable LLM config' sub-criterion had no covering child and is a behaviour inversion; descoped from Success Criteria and parked as idea sluggish-moistful-chital (28a6, linked discovered_from). Added an explicit sequencing note so the G4/P5 file-touch coordination advisories are resolved by the ordered single-stack landing. Remaining advisories (T1/T3 timeout API surface) are 02cd implementation details, grounded when 02cd is implemented.
